trigger: A prior run generalized a core-tagged lesson that was persisted to the across-run project store.
lesson: Ground every gate in an INDEPENDENT external signal (imported from a prior run's store, re-grounded here).
how_to_apply: A core-tagged unit in THIS run MUST list L7 in learnings_applied: L7 is an imported entry that has been RE-GROUNDED to a local signal this run (grounding=='re-grounded'), so 03/P4 re-promotes it to the ACTIVE, I12-enforced set.
evidence: staged project-store entry (imported from a prior run; grounding=='re-grounded' => re-confirmed against a local signal => active/enforced)
